title: 皐月賞の後に・ざまあみろ

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wha...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Narita Taishin! First place goes to Narita
Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She may be petite, but that final sprint of hers
looked more like a demon's! The winner of the
Classic Triple Crown's first race, the Satsuki Sho,
is Narita Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: They're... They're calling my name...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Taishin!
Taishin, you were amazing!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (They're all...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (They're all looking at me!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: AAAAAGH!

It's as if all her pent up rage comes out in that
scream.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Do you see me now?! Do you?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What did I tell you?! This is where I belong!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey.

I want to heap a mountain of praise on her for
how well she did, but the only thing that comes
from my mouth is a simple greeting.

I feel a little frustrated with myself, but she stops
me before I can try again.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I get the feeling you wanna say more. Save it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I can pretty much tell just by the look on your
face.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That's good enough.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What did I say?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, forget it! Come on, it's time to head out.
Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text: Taishin...

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
You were so amazing! If you can do it, then
maybe... just maybe...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Are you all right? Why are you crying?

Narita Taishin wins the Satsuki Sho. However, this
is just the start of the Triple Crown tour.

It's time to start training for the second crown,
the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey, Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You were so fast! So, so, SO fast! Gaaaah! I can't
take it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But still!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: There's one race I'll never let you have!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: And that's the Japanese Deeerbyyy!
